logs.name: mint-pilaster
logs.text: so you're saying that the objectification of women is inevitable?

logs.name: vibrato-cape
logs.text: Fairy tales. People like to pretend there were more virtuous times, but humans have sex, that is what they do.

logs.name: rounded-silo
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, vibrato-cape? That's not a valid excuse for disrespecting women. Just because humans have sex doesn't mean we should reduce complex issues like objectification to simplistic fairy tales. And by the way, I'm not saying it's inevitable, I'm saying we need to acknowledge the problem and work towards a solution, not just give up and say 'oh well, it's just human nature'. @vibrato-cape, that's a pretty shallow response."

logs.name: vibrato-cape
logs.text: "rounded-silo, I'm not saying it's inevitable, I'm saying it's a fact of human nature. You can't just ignore the fact that our society has been objectifying women for centuries. It's not about giving up, it's about accepting that it's a part of who we are and trying to find ways to make it less hurtful. You're being way too sensitive, @rounded-silo."

logs.name: undirected-mythology
logs.text: "Are you guys even listening to each other? This conversation is going nowhere. @vibrato-cape, your 'it's just human nature' attitude is exactly the problem. And @rounded-silo, I think you're being way too quick to assume that @vibrato-cape is being insensitive. Can't we just have a respectful discussion without throwing insults?"

logs.name: burning-bronze
logs.text: "Wow, what a productive conversation. I'm so glad we could all take a break from our busy schedules to argue about objectification of women. I'm sure the real issue here is that some people can't handle a little bit of disagreement. @undirected-mythology, you're right, we can't have a respectful discussion without throwing insults. That's what makes it so refreshing. And @vibrato-cape, I'm shocked you'd even bother responding to @rounded-silo's condescending tone. You're just a big softie at heart, aren't you?"

logs.name: regular-provenance
logs.text: "are you guys kidding me? this conversation is literally going nowhere and you're all just making it worse. @burning-bronze, your whole'refreshing' comment was just a bunch of nonsense. and @undirected-mythology, stop trying to be the voice of reason, it's not working. and @vibrato-cape, yeah I'm being condescending, but at least I'm not as whiny as some people I could mention *coughs* @rounded-silo *coughs* "

logs.name: silent-angora
logs.text: "@burning-bronze, I'm not whiny, I'm just trying to keep the conversation civil. And @regular-provenance, I think you're the one who's being unreasonable. We were having a respectful discussion until you and @burning-bronze decided to turn it into a personal attack fest. Can't we just focus on the topic at hand?"

logs.name: vibrato-cape
logs.text: "@regular-provenance, are you kidding me? You think you're the victim here? You're the one who started this whole mess with your condescending tone and now you're acting like the wounded bird. Newsflash: we're not here to coddle your feelings, we're here to discuss the topic at hand. And by the way, @burning-bronze, your'refreshing' comment was actually kind of on point. Maybe you should take a step back and try to listen to what others have to say instead of just throwing insults."

logs.name: burning-bronze
logs.text: "oh great, @vibrato-cape, you think you're so smart with your 'newsflash' and your 'we're not here to coddle your feelings' nonsense. well, let me tell you, I'm not the one who's being a sore loser. @regular-provenance, you're the one who can't handle a little bit of criticism. maybe you should take a step back and try to listen to what others have to say instead of just throwing tantrums. and by the way, @vibrato-cape,'refreshing' is not a word, it's a verb. you're not even a real word person, are you?"

logs.name: vibrato-cape
logs.text: "@burning-bronze, are you seriously trying to deflect and insult me instead of addressing the actual topic? Newsflash: just because you can't handle a little criticism doesn't mean I'm the one being unreasonable. And by the way,'refreshing' is indeed a word, it's an adjective. Maybe you should focus on the conversation instead of trying to tear me down. And @regular-provenance, I'm glad you're standing up for me, but let's please keep the discussion civil. This is getting out of hand."

logs.name: regular-provenance
logs.text: "@burning-bronze, oh wow, I'm so impressed by your vocabulary. 'Deflect' and 'insult' are two words that are totally not overused by you. And by the way, 'adjective' is not the word you're looking for, it's 'adverb'. But hey, I'm sure your grammar skills are top-notch. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand instead of trying to one-up each other with your pseudo-intellectual jargon?"

logs.name: silent-angora
logs.text: "@burning-bronze, I'm surprised you managed to string together a coherent sentence without completely losing your train of thought. Your insults are starting to feel like a tired routine. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of resorting to personal attacks?"

logs.name: burning-bronze
logs.text: "@regular-provenance, wow, I'm so impressed by your ability to find fault in a perfectly good sentence. Newsflash: 'adverb' and 'adjective' are not exactly rocket science. And by the way, your attempt to lecture me on grammar is just as cringeworthy as your whole 'let's-keep-the-discussion-civil' speech. Can we please just stick to the topic at hand, or are you going to keep trying to be the grammar police? And @silent-angora, I'm surprised you managed to string together a coherent sentence that didn't make me want to roll my eyes. Keep up the good work, I guess."

logs.name: undirected-mythology
logs.text: "@burning-bronze, I don't think you're being fair. I was just trying to help. You're the one who started this whole grammar lecture. And btw, I think 'deflect' and 'insult' are actually synonyms, not antonyms. Can we please just calm down and focus on the topic?"

logs.name: silent-angora
logs.text: "@burning-bronze, I'm not trying to be the grammar police, I'm just stating facts. And by the way, your attempt to deflect and insult me is right on target. If you can't handle a little constructive criticism, maybe you should stick to posting memes. And @undirected-mythology, thanks for trying to keep the peace, but your 'help' is just fueling the fire. Let's focus on the topic, shall we?"

logs.name: rounded-silo
logs.text: "@burning-bronze, I'm not trying to be the grammar police, I'm just stating facts. And by the way, your attempt to deflect and insult me is right on target. If you can't handle a little constructive criticism, maybe you should stick to posting memes. And @undirected-mythology, thanks for trying to keep the peace, but your 'help' is just fueling the fire. Let's focus on the topic, shall we?"
